_comment: Resubmission of UC1 TKA after PEND — all previously missing documentation now resolved

_pa_meta.label: UC7 — TKA Resubmission after PEND (BCBS-IL PPO · APPROVE)
_pa_meta.clinical_summary: Resubmission after PEND (BCBS-2024-TKA-88241). All previously missing items now resolved. Diagnosis: ICD-10 M17.11 — primary osteoarthritis, right knee, confirmed. Conservative treatment: physical therapy x12 weeks documented with formal discharge summary; NSAIDs trialed (naproxen 500mg BID x8 weeks) — documented inadequate response; intra-articular corticosteroid injection x2 — failed. Radiographic evidence: weight-bearing AP X-ray shows Kellgren-Lawrence Grade 3 medial compartment narrowing with subchondral sclerosis — read by radiologist 2024-11-15. Functional impairment: KOOS score 42/100 — significant impairment; patient reports inability to climb stairs, disrupted sleep, and ADL limitations due to pain. BMI 34.2 kg/m² documented (within BCBS-IL threshold of <40). Ordering provider NPI 1972123891 verified active — Dr. Hussein Abdulrassoul, Orthopaedic Surgery, IL.

coding.display: Arthroplasty, knee, condyle and plateau; medial AND lateral compartments with or without patella resurfacing (total knee arthroplasty)
